dsl_rule.translation_notes: Broadening bottom identified by Donchian channels; entry on close below formation low (dc_lower). Exit when price reverses above the breakout point or fails to move down 5% (stop_loss). Success rate varies significantly by market regime (62% bull vs 34% bear), so ANY regime allowed. Pattern typically forms during recovery from dead-cat bounce.

source_rule_text: Broadening Bottom: Price closes below the formation low, signaling a downward breakout
